description_long: This is a squeezable tube of hand lotion with a predominantly black background and vibrant, colorful graphics. The front features the text 'LEMON JUICE & GLYCERINE' and 'perinteinen KÄSIVOIDE' along with illustrations of lemons, white flowers, and green leaves, giving it a fresh and botanical appearance. The back of the tube displays detailed product information, ingredients, and usage instructions in white text. The tube is made of flexible plastic, with a rounded, flat cap at the bottom for standing upright. The cap appears to be a screw-on type, likely made of a harder plastic than the body. The overall design is modern and visually appealing, suitable for personal care use in urban environments.
description: A black squeezable hand lotion tube with lemon and floral graphics, featuring product information and a screw-on cap.
description_view_0: Front view showing the product name, lemon and floral graphics, and main branding.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the tube's slim profile and partial wraparound graphics.
description_view_2: Back view displaying detailed product information, ingredients, and instructions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the tube's narrow edge and continuation of the graphic design.
